creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:38:19 2014
New Revision: 355185
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355185
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355185/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, convert to new options helper
  
  PR:		ports/189546
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:14 2014	(r355184)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:19 2014	(r355185)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Take snapshots from Subversion activity
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/svnnotify:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/svnnotify:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify
 
@@ -19,11 +22,7 @@ CONFIG_DESC=	Enable YAML syntax for post
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	modbuild
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCONFIG}
-BUILD_DEPENDS+=	p5-SVN-Notify-Config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Config
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-SVN-Notify-Config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Config
-.endif
+CONFIG_BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Notify-Config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Config
+CONFIG_RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Notify-Config>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Config
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:38:14 2014	(r355184)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Snapshot/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:38:19 2014	(r355185)
@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@ This Perl module produces snapshots of a
 Typically used as part of a postcommit script, it will automatically
 create a .tar.gz file for every commit to a specified path.
 
-WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Notify-Snapshot/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Notify-Snapshot/
